name: Dropdown
description: Complete select/dropdown component combining a trigger (DropdownInput), popover positioning, and menu with options. Supports single and multi-select.

composition.menu: Menu with MenuGroup and MenuItem/DropdownItem children

options.description: Array of { value, label, leftIcon?, disabled? } for simple usage.

menuWidth.description: Menu width behavior. 'trigger' matches trigger width.

behavior.singleSelect: Selecting an option closes the dropdown and sets the value.
behavior.multiSelect: Selecting an option toggles it. Dropdown stays open. Trigger shows count badge.
behavior.keyboard: Escape closes the dropdown and returns focus to trigger.

DropdownItem.description: Individual selectable option within the dropdown menu.

DropdownGroup.description: Groups options with an optional heading. Wraps MenuGroup.

popover.animation: fade-in + zoom-in-95 on open, reverse on close
popover.slideDirection: from-top when below trigger, from-bottom when above

accessibility.notes: Menu has role='listbox'. DropdownItem has role='option' with aria-selected. Multi-select sets aria-multiselectable on the listbox.
